message:
test(health,events,metrics,policy): add pure-logic unit tests

Cover normalizeConfidence, dedupeIndicators, hasRateLimitIssue,
hasErrorIssue, statusSeverity, detectProcessStatus, calculateStatus
edge cases, SessionNotFoundError in health; ToMap for all data types,
NewEventWithCorrelation, EventType constants in events;
generateTargetComparisons, CompareSnapshots regressions, latency
sample cap, Tier0 constant consistency in metrics; splitLines,
BlockedEntry, Policy.Stats in policy.

Coverage: health 52.7→65.7%, events 57.6→59.3%, metrics 54.8→60.6%,
policy 34.3→41.0%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
